comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato, a tempo) + Refrain (slowly, with much expression). Pipeline has lyric gap at m19 (5n, lost all refrain-opening lyrics). m15 'door.' note lost (0n 1r, unfixable). m26 lost 1 note from 'ma-gic mo-ment' (4 syllables on 3n). m34 and m38 each lost 1 note, dropping a syllable.

1.comment: Pipeline had 'seem ed' with OCR space insertion. Published: 'Noth - ing seemed to'.

2.comment: Pipeline had 'a.' with spurious period. Published: 'mat - ter a - ny'.

5.comment: Pipeline had 'nt' missing apostrophe. Published: 'Did - n't care what'.

13.comment: Pipeline had 'a.' with spurious period. Published: 'came a knock - knock -'.

19.comment: GAP: Pipeline has 5 notes but NO LYRICS. Published: 'Love walked right in and' (refrain opening).

23.comment: Pipeline had 'brou much sun ni Love' -- garbled syllables and next-phrase bleed. Published: 'brought my sun - ni - est'. 5n.

26.comment: Pipeline had 'right mo ment' -- 'right' is wrong word. Published: 'ma - gic mo - ment' (4 syllables on 4 notes but pipeline has 3n + 1r). Best fit for 3n: 'ma gic mo'. Note lost: 'ment' on the rest.

27.comment: Pipeline had 'sha to' -- OCR garble for 'seemed to'. Published: 'and my heart seemed to'. 5n.

29.comment: Pipeline correct but published has opening quote. Published: 'That love said "Hel'. 4n + 1r.

31.comment: Pipeline had 'a.' with spurious period. Published: 'Though not a'. 3n + 1r.

34.comment: Pipeline had 'look I for' -- dropped 'and'. Published: 'look and I for -' (4 syllables). Pipeline lost 1 note (3n + 1r). Best fit for 3n: 'look and I'. The '-for' syllable is on the lost note.

38.comment: Pipeline had 'look I had' -- dropped 'and'. Published: 'look and I had' (4 syllables). Pipeline lost 1 note (3n + 1r). Best fit for 3n: 'look and I'. The 'had' syllable is on the lost note.

43.comment: Pipeline had 'found a.' with spurious period. Published: 'found a'. 2n.

46.comment: Pipeline had 'love walk in with' -- missing past tense '-ed'. Published: 'love walked in with'. 4n.
